title: Install structures for permaculture systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install structures for permaculture systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for structural work

pcs.text: Interpret plans and verify specifications with stakeholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret plans and verify specifications with stakeholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret plans and verify specifications with stakeholder.

pcs.text: Confirm construction method and resource requirements with stakeholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm construction method and resource requirements with stakeholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm construction method and resource requirements with stakeholder.

pcs.text: Verify compliance with regulatory requirements according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify compliance with regulatory requirements according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify quantity and quality of materials from design drawings and specifications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify quantity and quality of materials from design drawings and specifications.

pcs.text: Check and dress reclaimed materials to comply with specifications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and dress reclaimed materials to comply with specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check size and quality of supplied materials against specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report or replace substandard materials according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare tools and equipment for construction work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare tools and equipment for construction work.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk, and implement controls according to workplace health, safety and environmental procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk, and implement controls according to workplace health, safety and environmental procedures.
